C/C FOR SETTLELMENT CONF. IN DEPT. 503B. NANCY DAVIS, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. HELEN SORUP-MATLEY, CSR, PARTIES PRESENT: ARNOLD W. EVJE II, ATTY. FOR PLTF. H. A. SINH WHO WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS AVAILABLE BY TELEPHONE. ALSO PRESENT WERE DEFTS. BEATRICE JACK AKA BEATRICE MYNOTT AND STEVE MOORE. DEFT. CAROLINE JACK WAS NOT PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AS TO TWO OF THE THREE DEFTS, BEATRICE JACK AKA BEATRICE MYNOTT AND STEVE MOORE. DEFT. CAROLINE JACK IS TO BE PRESENTED WITH A COPY OF THIS WRITTEN AGREEMENT AND PROVIDED SHE SIGNS IT ALONG WITH THE TWO OTHER DEFENDANTS, THIS MATTER IS CONSIDERED SETTLED. PRO TEM NANCY DAVIS ORDERED THAT THIS MATTER BE RETAINED ON THE JURY TRIAL CALENDAR UNTIL SUCH TIME AS PLTF'S COUNSEL NOTIFIES THE COURT THAT ALL DEFENDANTS HAVE SIGNED THE AGREEMENT.
